hooks.command: FILE_PATHS="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; for f in $FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" =~ \.py$ ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null; .venv/bin/python -m ruff check --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; done; exit 0

FILE_PATHS="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS"; HAS_SRC=false; for f in $FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" =~ src/.*\.py$ ]]; then HAS_SRC=true; break; fi; done; if [ "$HAS_SRC" = true ]; then .venv/bin/python -m mypy src/ --no-error-summary 2>&1 | tail -20 || true; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-(rf|fr)\s+/(\s|\*|$|;)|rm\s+-(rf|fr)\s+\*|rm\s+-(rf|fr)\s+\.|rm\s+-(rf|fr)\s+~'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: rm -rf with dangerous target. Specify exact paths.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)|git\s+push\s+origin\s+(main|master)'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Direct push to main or force push. Create a feature branch and PR.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

[ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] && exit 0; REPO="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in "$REPO"/AGENTS.md|"$REPO"/CLAUDE.md) continue ;; "$REPO"/*) echo '❌ BLOCKED: Cannot edit repo files on main. Allowed: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md. Create a feature branch.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; done; exit 0

CMD=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then .venv/bin/python -m ruff format --check src/ tests/ >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '❌ BLOCKED: Unformatted files. Run ruff format first.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; exit 0

STOP_ACTIVE=$(cat | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false'); if [ "$STOP_ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; RESPONSE=$(cat | jq -r '.assistant_response // empty' | tail -200); if echo "$RESPONSE" | grep -qiE 'TODO|FIXME|will implement later|placeholder|stub'; then echo '⚠️ Response contains incomplete markers (TODO/FIXME/placeholder). Consider finishing before stopping.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
